children.text: Fiona McIntyre is a taxi driver in London. She tells us about her work and some of her experiences.
children.cn: 菲奥娜·麦金太尔是伦敦的一名出租车司机。她向我们讲述了她的工作和一些经历。
children.notes: The interview introduces Fiona and her job.
children.statement: Fiona is a taxi driver.
children.explanation: 文中明确提到她是 'a taxi driver'。

children.text: Question 1: When did you start?
children.cn: 问题 1：你是什么时候开始的？

children.text: I've been a taxi driver for about five years.
children.cn: 我已经当了大约五年的出租车司机了。
children.statement: She has been a taxi driver for 10 years.
children.explanation: 文中说的是 'about five years'。

children.text: Before that I was a bus driver in London, and I enjoyed it, but I wanted to be more independent so I changed and started driving my taxi.
children.cn: 在那之前，我是伦敦的一名公交车司机。我很喜欢那份工作，但我想要更独立，所以我转行开始开出租车。
children.notes: 'Independent' was the motivation for changing jobs.
children.statement: She was a bus driver before.
children.explanation: 文中提到 'Before that I was a bus driver'。

children.text: Question 2: Have you ever had any famous passengers?
children.cn: 问题 2：你有没有载过名人的乘客？

children.text: Oh yes. I've had film stars, politicians, you know, lots of famous people.
children.cn: 哦，是的。我载过电影明星、政治家，你知道，很多名人。
children.notes: She meets many high-profile people in London.
children.statement: Fiona never carries famous people.
children.explanation: 文中说她载过 'lots of famous people'。

children.text: About a year ago, a really famous actor got in my taxi.
children.cn: 大约一年前，一位非常有名的演员上了我的车。
children.statement: The actor entered the taxi a year ago.
children.explanation: 文中提到 'About a year ago'。

children.text: I took him to the airport.
children.cn: 我送他去机场。
children.statement: They went to the train station.
children.explanation: 文中说 'took him to the airport'。

children.text: There was a lot of traffic and it took a long time to get there, so he missed his plane.
children.cn: 当时交通很拥挤，花了很长时间才到，所以他错过了飞机。
children.statement: The actor missed his flight.
children.explanation: 因为堵车，他错过了飞机。

children.text: It wasn't my fault but when he got out of the taxi, he said some things that weren't very polite!
children.cn: 这不是我的错，但当他下车时，他说了一些不太礼貌的话！
children.statement: The actor was polite.
children.explanation: 文中说 'weren't very polite'。

children.text: I said to him, 'Next time, take a bus!'
children.cn: 我对他说：‘下次坐公交车吧！’
children.statement: Fiona told him to walk.
children.explanation: 她建议他坐公交车。

children.statement: 根据本句内容，这句话的中文意思是：“问题 2：你有没有载过名人的乘客？”。
children.explanation: 这是原句“Question 2: Have you ever had any famous passengers?”的正确中文翻译。

children.text: Question 3: Have passengers ever left anything in your taxi?
children.cn: 问题 3：乘客有没有在你的车里留下过什么东西？

children.text: Oh yes! People have left all kinds of things in here - a suitcase, a hat, mobile phones of course, even a dog once!
children.cn: 哦，是的！人们在这里留下了各种各样的东西——手提箱、帽子，当然还有手机，甚至有一次还留下了一条狗！
children.notes: 'All kinds of' implies a wide variety.
children.statement: A dog was once left in the taxi.
children.explanation: 文中提到 'even a dog once'。

children.text: Years ago, a woman left a pair of shoes on the back seat.
children.cn: 几年前，一个女人在后座留了一双鞋。
children.statement: The shoes were on the front seat.
children.explanation: 文中说在 'back seat'。

children.text: And one time a passenger left his teeth here! Not real teeth, of course false teeth.
children.cn: 还有一次，一名乘客把牙留在了这里！当然不是真牙，是假牙。
children.statement: The teeth were real.
children.explanation: 文中强调是 'false teeth'。

children.text: And people have asked me to do some strange jobs.
children.cn: 人们还请我做过一些奇怪的工作。
children.statement: The jobs were normal.
children.explanation: 文中说 'strange jobs'。

children.text: Once a doctor stopped me outside a hospital and asked me to take a skeleton to another hospital. And I did.
children.cn: 有一次，一位医生在一家医院外面拦住我，让我把一副骨架送到另一家医院。我照做了。
children.statement: Fiona took a skeleton to a hospital.
children.explanation: 文中提到 'take a skeleton to another hospital'。

children.text: But I asked the doctor to pay first - the skeleton couldn't pay, after all!
children.cn: 但我请医生先付钱——毕竟骨架没法付钱！
children.statement: The doctor paid after the trip.
children.explanation: 文中说她让医生 'pay first'。

children.statement: 根据本句内容，这句话的中文意思是：“问题 3：乘客有没有在你的车里留下过什么东西？”。
children.explanation: 这是原句“Question 3: Have passengers ever left anything in your taxi?”的正确中文翻译。

children.text: Question 4: What's the worst part of your job?
children.cn: 问题 4：你工作中通过最糟糕的部分是什么？

children.text: Good question. I've always enjoyed being a taxi driver and I don't want to change.
children.cn: 问得好。我一直很喜欢当出租车司机，我不想改行。
children.statement: Fiona wants to change her job.
children.explanation: 文中说 'I don't want to change'。

children.text: But of course, sometimes, it's not great.
children.cn: 但当然，有时候也没那么好。
children.statement: The job is always perfect.
children.explanation: 文中说 'sometimes, it's not great'。

children.text: I don't like driving around without a passenger, but it's better than just waiting at the airport or at a railway station.
children.cn: 我不喜欢不载客四处乱转，但总比在机场或火车站干等要好。
children.statement: Fiona likes waiting at the airport.
children.explanation: 文中说 'driving around... is better than just waiting'。

children.text: I think that's the worst part - waiting.
children.cn: 我认为最糟糕的部分就是等待。
children.statement: Waiting is the worst part.
children.explanation: 文中明确说 'that's the worst part - waiting'。

children.statement: 根据本句内容，这句话的中文意思是：“问题 4：你工作中通过最糟糕的部分是什么？”。
children.explanation: 这是原句“Question 4: What's the worst part of your job?”的正确中文翻译。
